perf_hint: up to `layers` drops per pixel over two spectrum taps, so frame time scales with pixel count and `layers` — on software rendering preview with `--sample 10s` before committing to 1080p

params.name: columns
params.description: How many columns of rain divide the spectrum, bass at the left.

params.name: fall
params.description: How fast the rain falls, in frames per second of travel.

params.name: streak
params.description: How long a drop's trail hangs above its head.

params.name: layers
params.description: How many drops share each column at different speeds.

params.name: glow
params.description: How hot each drop's head burns.

params.name: flash
params.description: How much a hit lights the whole sky of rain.

params.name: vignette
params.description: How far the corners of the frame fall off.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts into the rain.
